name: Lovebite Weizenbier
recipeIngredient: 1 package Liquid Weizenbier Ale Yeast or
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the wheat and barley malt extracts with 1.5 gallons of water in a large pot.
2. Add the boiling Hallertauer hops to the mixture and bring it to a boil for 60 minutes.
3. Sparge the mash and transfer the hot wort to an airlock fermenter.
4. Cool the wort to room temperature, then add the yeast (1 package of Liquid Weizenbier Ale Yeast or 2 packages of Ale yeast-Red Star).
5. Seal the fermenter with a sanitized lid and allow it to ferment for several weeks until active fermentation stops.
6. Carefully transfer the beer into a bottling bucket filled with cold corn sugar (3/4 cup) to carbonate.
7. Age the beer in a cool place for at least 2 weeks before serving.
